title: 3Powers CLI output preferences (ui.yaml)
description: Presentation only: shapes human output. Never changes machine output (--json), exit codes, verdict bytes, or the ledger. A missing or malformed file falls back to the shipped defaults.

color_mode.description: auto (color only on an interactive TTY; default), always (force color), never (no color).

verbosity.description: quiet (result + failures only), normal (structured summary; default), verbose (adds per-step detail).

layout.description: normal (blank-line section separation; default) or compact (trimmed).
